title: lyonia villosa
intro: Lyonia villosa, also known as the Frostweed or Woolly Lyonia, is a shrub-like perennial plant native to North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, sore throats, and respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce swelling and ease pain, making it a popular remedy for colds, flu, and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Lyonia villosa can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for a range of applications and uses.
